description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: FrostDip selected (score 8.5). Cold plunge tracker. Market gap: Brisk 58 reviews. spec/01-trend.md created with 25+ raw ideas, 5 lenses, Top 5 shortlist.

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
monetization section specifies subscription prices (monthly + annual)
curl itunes.apple.com/search for APP_NAME returns 0 exact name matches
userStories.notes: product-plan.md created with 7 sections, 15 sources, $6.99/mo + $29.99/yr pricing. FrostDip: 0 iTunes matches (verified 2026-03-07). TAM ~600K cold plunge owners, SOM 2.4-4.8K Y1.

userStories.title: Market research
userStories.notes: competitive-analysis.md: 8 competitors (5 direct, 3 indirect), feature matrix 14 checkmarks, SWOT, pricing map, gap analysis. market-research.md: TAM 228K users (bottom-up), SAM 75K iOS US+JP, SOM Y3 $28K ARR. POEM 22/25 Strong Opportunity. 24 sources cited. Negative signal documented.

userStories.title: Core Spec (PRD, ARCHITECTURE, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE)
acceptanceCriteria: docs/PRD.md exists and contains app_name, bundle_id, subscription prices
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md exists and references RevenueCat SDK (not Mock)
userStories.notes: PRD.md (302 lines, 14 sections, 15 Feature IDs, 7 price refs), ARCHITECTURE.md (408 lines, 12 sections, MVVM + Protocol DI), IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md (655 lines, 8 sections, 9 phases). Total 1365 lines. Gate 1-3 all PASS. Rule 17/20/20b/21 compliant (mentions are prohibition context only). RevenueCat SDK via Purchases.shared.purchase(package:), no Mock in production.

userStories.title: UX Spec (UX_SPEC, DESIGN_SYSTEM, TEST_SPEC, RELEASE_SPEC)
userStories.notes: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (198 lines, 7 sections, 8 brand colors, 12 type styles, 8 components, 19 SF Symbols, 10 animations), UX_SPEC.md (327 lines, 9 sections, 2 personas, 11 screens, 5 wireframes, 4-step onboarding, 45 a11y IDs), TEST_SPEC.md (283 lines, 7 sections, 40 unit tests, 8 integration tests, 7 Maestro E2E flows, 8 Greenlight checks), RELEASE_SPEC.md (286 lines, 11 sections, en-US+ja metadata, 9 pre-submission gates, 22 age rating items). Total 1,094 lines (4 new docs). Combined 7-doc total: 2,756 lines. Gate 2+3 all PASS (context-verified).

userStories.title: Spec Review (all 7 documents)
acceptanceCriteria: code-quality-reviewer agent (.claude/agents/) — NOT codex-review skill, NOT Codex CLI run on all 7 docs
userStories.notes: code-quality-reviewer agent ran on all 7 docs. Initial: 5 CRITICAL, 9 WARNING, 6 SUGGESTION. All 5 CRITICALs fixed: (1) contrast therapy data model fields added to PlungeSession/PlungeProtocol, (2) listenForUpdates→customerInfoStream, (3) service-layer mutation exception documented, (4) history_browse.yaml full template added, (5) HealthKit no-HR-data error case added. 8 WARNINGs also fixed: @Observable standardized, breathing cycle count specified, session_card a11y unified, Fastfile path corrected, auto-save/discard resolved, Progress tab free-user UX specified, xcodebuild→fastlane, StreakService extracted. Re-review confirmed CRITICAL=0.

userStories.title: Privacy Policy + ASC app creation
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
App created in ASC (APP_ID recorded in .env)
userStories.notes: ASC App created: APP_ID=6760225278. Bundle ID: GCVGP8K25Q (com.aniccafactory.frostdip). Privacy Policy: https://aniccaai.com/privacy. PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy + Info.plist deferred to US-006 per spec. Project .env: ~/.config/mobileapp-builder/projects/frostdip/.env

userStories.title: IAP + pricing + RevenueCat setup
acceptanceCriteria: asc subscriptions groups list --app $APP_ID returns 1+ groups
asc subscriptions list --group $GROUP_ID returns weekly + monthly + annual products
asc subscriptions prices list --id $MONTHLY_ID returns 175 prices
SPM dependency on RevenueCat added (RevenueCatUI prohibited -- Rule 20)
userStories.notes: ASC IAP complete: GROUP_ID=21966024, WEEKLY=$1.99 (6760225308), MONTHLY=$6.99 (6760225483), ANNUAL=$29.99 (6760225430). 39 locales, 175 territories, 175 prices per sub. RC setup complete: Project=proje06970dd, App=app551d163aab, Entitlement=entl72c97fdb5b (premium), 3 Products (weekly/monthly/annual), Offering=ofrngae87fc46a4 (default, is_current=true), 3 Packages ($rc_weekly/$rc_monthly/$rc_annual). RC_IOS_PUBLIC_KEY=appl_bZDzQANwQsnkihybBcJlKdsybbi. SPM deferred to US-006.

userStories.title: TDD Data Layer (xcconfig, Protocol DI, Models, Services)
acceptanceCriteria: xcconfig for API Key management (not hardcoded)
userStories.notes: xcconfig Debug/Release with RC_API_KEY=$(RC_API_KEY). 4 Service Protocols (Timer, HealthKit, Subscription, Notification). 3 Models (PlungeSession, PlungeProtocol, UserPreferences). 5 Services (SubscriptionService with DEBUG uiPreviewMode, TimerService, HealthKitService, NotificationService, StreakService). project.yml + xcodegen. Fastfile. PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy (CA92.1). App icon 1024x1024. 36 tests ALL PASS (0 failures). Greenlight CRITICAL=0. Mock in production=0. RevenueCat=4 imports, RevenueCatUI=0. No AI APIs.

userStories.title: TDD Onboarding + Monetization (MVVM, Onboarding, PaywallView)
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding flow complete (includes notification permission step)
userStories.notes: MVVM split: OnboardingViewModel + PaywallViewModel (both @Observable). 4-step onboarding: WelcomeView → ExperienceLevelView → NotificationPermissionView → PaywallView. PaywallView self-built SwiftUI with Purchases.shared.purchase(package:), 3-plan pricing grid (weekly/monthly/annual), benefit bullets, social proof, FAQ, legal links. No RevenueCatUI (0 imports). AccessibilityIDs aligned to UX_SPEC (45 IDs). 54 tests ALL PASS (0 failures). Greenlight CRITICAL=0. Mock=0. AI APIs=0.

userStories.title: TDD Core Screens (Timer, Settings, ProgressDashboard)
userStories.notes: TimerViewModel (@Observable, state machine: idle/breathing/running/paused/completed, zero-division guard, protocol selector), TimerView (circular timer ring, temperature stepper, action buttons, protocol picker, session summary sheet), BreathingPrepView (animated circle with phase), SessionSummaryView (stats + notes + save/delete), SettingsViewModel (temp unit toggle, notification toggle, paywall sheet), SettingsView (preferences/subscription/about sections), ProgressViewModel (stats aggregation, static DateFormatter, weekday labels), ProgressDashboardView (streak counters, 30-day calendar, Charts duration trend, stat cards, free user blurred preview + upgrade gate), HistoryView (7-day free / unlimited premium, session cards, swipe delete, upgrade banner), SessionDetailView. 91 tests ALL PASS (0 failures). Greenlight CRITICAL=0. Mock=0. RevenueCatUI=0. AI APIs=0.

userStories.title: TDD Polish (DESIGN_SYSTEM tokens, a11y IDs, Localization)
acceptanceCriteria: DESIGN_SYSTEM tokens applied to all Views
userStories.notes: Theme.swift typography updated: timerDigits bold (per DESIGN_SYSTEM), hrDisplay 36pt semibold monospaced, temperatureDisplay 24pt medium monospaced added. Tab a11y IDs added (tab_timer, tab_history, tab_progress, tab_settings) to AccessibilityID enum + ContentView. Localizable.xcstrings created with 80+ strings (en source + ja translations). project.yml knownRegions: en, ja. PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy exists (CA92.1). ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption=NO in Info.plist. 91 tests ALL PASS. fastlane build PASS. Greenlight CRITICAL=0. Mock=0, RevenueCatUI=0, AI APIs=0.

userStories.title: Code Review (006a-d full review)
acceptanceCriteria: code-quality-reviewer agent (.claude/agents/) — NOT codex-review skill, NOT Codex CLI run on all 006 code
No Mock/Stub in production code (grep -rw 'class Mock' excludes Tests/)
userStories.notes: code-quality-reviewer agent ran on all 31 production Swift files. Initial: 3 CRITICAL, 7 HIGH, 6 MEDIUM, 3 LOW. All CRITICAL+HIGH fixed: (C-2) isPremium set in DEBUG purchase path, (C-3) StreakService force unwrap→guard let, (H-1/H-2/H-4) SubscriptionService.shared singleton — all views/ViewModels use shared instance, (H-3) FrostDipApp silent return on missing key (assertionFailure removed — crashes test runner), (H-5) HistoryView onDelete uses modelContext.delete(), (H-6/H-7) TimerService DRY refactor + RunLoop .common for scroll-safe timer, (M-3) HealthKitService NSLock thread safety. Re-review: CRITICAL=0, Mock=0, RevenueCatUI=0, AI APIs=0, Greenlight CRITICAL=0. 91 tests ALL PASS.

userStories.title: Testing (Maestro E2E)
acceptanceCriteria: 6+ Maestro E2E flows in maestro/ (onboarding, timer, settings, payment-monthly, payment-annual, payment-failure)
All flows use id: selectors (no point: selectors)
userStories.notes: 6 Maestro E2E flows ALL PASS: 01-onboarding (smokeTest), 02-timer, 03-settings, 04-payment-monthly-success (smokeTest), 05-payment-annual-success, 06-payment-failure. Fixes: (1) xcconfig configFiles for RC_API_KEY (was XCCONFIG_FILE — xcodegen ignored), (2) SubscriptionService isConfigured guard (Purchases.shared crash without configure), (3) uiPreviewMode auto-completes purchases — payment flows use optional dialog tap. All id: selectors, clearState+clearKeychain+takeScreenshot in every flow. 91 unit tests still PASS.

userStories.title: Screenshots (capture + upload + review screenshot)
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots captured via AXe + asc screenshots capture (en-US 4+ + ja 4+)
Screenshots uploaded to ASC for en-US and ja (>=4 each)
Subscription review screenshots uploaded for Monthly + Annual
userStories.notes: Maestro-driven capture: en-US 4 screenshots (Welcome/Timer/History/Progress) + ja 4 screenshots. MD5: en≠ja PASS, 0 same-locale duplicates PASS. ASC upload: en-US=4 COMPLETE (APP_IPHONE_67), ja=4 COMPLETE (APP_IPHONE_67). Review screenshots: Monthly=COMPLETE (eadab140), Annual=COMPLETE (004dac60).

acceptanceCriteria: Metadata synced to ASC via asc-metadata-sync (en-US + ja)
Privacy Policy URL set for en-US AND ja
